# Sales Menu

Bolt Farm Treehouse — Private Couples Renewal Experience

---

## Experience Tiers

| Tier | Investment | Includes | Notes |
|------|-----------|----------|-------|
| Standard (50%) | Dynamic pricing | The renewal experience itself. 50% deposit + remaining at arrival | |
| All Inclusive (real name TBD) | Dynamic pricing | 1 couples signature spa treatment, WH access, Meals, Romance Exp (includes bath butler service, chocolate truffles), Wedding cake | Rebranding as "Best of Bolt Farm." 2 payment options: PIF and save 5% or 50% now, 50% due before arrival. Should be around $4k. Targets 2-night weekdays |
| Premium All Inclusive (real name TBD) | $10k fixed investment | 3-night weekend experience, 2 couples signature spa treatments, WH access, Meals, Romance Exp (includes bath butler service, chocolate truffles), Wedding cake, Champagne saber experience (includes bottle of champagne + 2 BFT flutes), Love Lock experience, Self-guided vow renewal, Seth Bolt private serenade | |
| Rebooking All Inclusive | Dynamic pricing | Spa treatment (sales team selects), WH, Meals, Romance Exp. Deposit to book, 1 payment 90 days before arrival, remaining 14 days before arrival | |
| Premium Booking Protection (50%) | Dynamic pricing | The renewal experience itself + premium booking protection. 50% deposit + remaining at arrival | Rarely used |
| Rebooking | Dynamic pricing | Deposit to book, 1 payment 90 days before arrival, remaining 14 days before arrival | Perks: choose your own villa and no pressure to pick dates for 90 days. No delayed payment schedule |

---

## Designed Experiences

| Experience | Investment | Includes |
|------------|-----------|----------|
| Romance Experience | $495 | Candlelit setup with petals, Fresh rose bouquet, Gourmet chocolate truffles, In-room bath ritual setup (bath bomb, soaks, salts, floating candles), Reconnect cards, Bottle of wine |
| VIP Experience | $745 | Meals (includes s'mores and pizza kit), WH access, 2 mugs, $100 toward next renewal |
| Custom Proposal Experience | $795–$995 | Romantic proposal setup, Abundant rose petals + candles, Styled decor (lanterns, props), Bottle of champagne, Romantic picnic with wine + charcuterie board, Rose bouquet, 2 robes, 2 BFT champagne flutes |

---

## Fees

| Fee | Investment | Notes |
|-----|-----------|-------|
| Premium Booking Protection | $299 | |
| Service Fee | $195 | Includes damage waiver, wifi, etc. |
| Rescheduling Fee | 10% | Adjusted based on experience total |

## Spa

### Wellness Haven Experience

| Treatment | Duration | Description | Investment (excl. gratuity) | Investment (incl. gratuity) |
|-----------|----------|-------------|----------------------------|----------------------------|
| Wellness Haven Day Pass | N/A | Private mountaintop spa sanctuary with panoramic valley views. Contrast pools, mirrored sauna and steam room, cold plunge. | $195 | |
| Couples Day Pass | N/A | | $350 | |

### Founders Signature Spa Experiences, Curated by Seth & Tori Bolt

**Couples Journeys** (Wellness Haven included)

| Treatment | Duration | Description | Investment (excl. gratuity) | Daily Spa Credit | Investment (incl. gratuity) |
|-----------|----------|-------------|----------------------------|------------------|----------------------------|
| Sunset Summit Ritual — "Private Haven Takeover" | | Full after-hours Haven buyout, 120-min private couples ritual, Bespoke floral + candle staging, Live musician or curated soundtrack, Professional photo + video capture, Champagne sabre + sunset toast, Chauffeured transfers, White-glove concierge planning | $7,500 | $300 | $9,000 |
| The Ultimate Couples Spa Escape — "Most Popular" | 160 min + WH passes for entire experience | Two-day journey: all signature experiences, champagne & truffles, keepsake photo, Wellness Haven access for entire experience | $1,795 | $300 | |
| Signature Couples Experience | 80 min | Side-by-side head-to-toe journey: personalized massage, restorative body treatment, deeply relaxing face massage with warm aromatic oil | $1,045 | $150 | |
| His & Hers Signature Pairing — "His Ritual + Her Glow" | 80 min | She: Signature HydraFacial. He: Gentleman's Ritual (hot stone massage, mineral salt exfoliation, hydrating men's facial) | $1,045 | $150 | |

## Merchandise

Merchandise is sold on-site only. A bundled "BFT Swag Bundle" is planned to replace individual phone sales:
- 2 BFT mugs
- 2 hats (one of each type)
- 1 candle
- Reflect & Connect cards
- Journal

---

| Item | Investment |
|------|-----------|
| Early Arrival (12pm) | $95 |
| Late Departure (12pm) | $95 |

## HubSpot Items

| Item | Investment | Includes | Notes |
|------|-----------|----------|-------|
| Campfire Songs & Stories | $9,995 | Private luxury villa (2-night weekday), Signature couples spa experiences (1 day), Full WH access, Meals, Concert with Seth, Signed vinyl, Photo with Seth | Fixed investment. Awareness issue, not pricing. Needs dedicated HS link with form questions, longer call times, VSL |
| Holiday Gift Card | $250 | $500 gift card for $250 | Archived — bring back next Black Friday |
| Winter Escape Deposit | $395 | Locks in promo: $200 spa credit, $250 toward experience, comp WH | Archived — bring back next Black Friday |

## Event Space

No active items. Wellness Haven Rooftop ($250) was removed — used as incentive to land group experiences instead.

---

## STR

No active items. STR Workshop removed. A Mastermind experience tier may eventually be added with perk bundles.
